reason: The remediation involves setting the system-wide crypto policy to 'FIPS:STIG'. Changes to cryptographic policies and FIPS mode can cause significant system instability, break existing application dependencies that rely on non-compliant algorithms, and potentially prevent system boot or service availability. Per policy instructions, FIPS changes are marked as too dangerous to remediate.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; networking affected; System-wide cryptographic policy change; Enforcement of FIPS mode; Potential breakage of legacy application dependencies; Risk of service unavailability due to incompatible cipher suites
